# Rehan Malik — AI/ML Engineer

> Senior AI/ML Engineer specializing in Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLMs),
> Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), AI Agents, and production ML systems.

## Who is Rehan Malik?

Rehan Malik is a Senior AI/ML Engineer with 5+ years of experience building
production AI systems at enterprise scale. He currently works at Reallytics.ai
and Verticiti, focusing on agentic AI, LLM fine-tuning, and real-time voice AI
infrastructure.

## Core Expertise

- **AI Agents & Multi-Agent Systems**: LangChain, function calling, planning loops, guardrails
- **RAG Pipelines**: FAISS, ChromaDB, Pinecone, cross-encoder re-ranking, 2TB+ enterprise search
- **LLM Fine-Tuning**: LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT, RLHF, DPO, PPO — 40% cost reduction vs hosted APIs
- **Voice AI**: Real-time speech-to-text, 500+ concurrent calls, Kafka, gRPC, CUDA
- **MLOps**: AWS SageMaker, Bedrock, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, model monitoring
- **Explainable AI**: SHAP, UMAP, ensemble methods, fraud detection at scale

## Key Projects

- [Agentic AI Workflows](https://github.com/rehan243/Agentic-AI-Workflows) — 8 production AI agents
- [RAG Enterprise Search](https://github.com/rehan243/RAG-Enterprise-Search) — 2TB+ retrieval pipeline
- [Voice AI Platform](https://github.com/rehan243/Voice-AI-Platform) — Real-time voice infrastructure
- [LLM Fine-Tuning LoRA](https://github.com/rehan243/LLM-Fine-Tuning-LoRA) — Parameter-efficient fine-tuning
- [RLHF LLM Optimization](https://github.com/rehan243/RLHF-LLM-Optimization) — Full RLHF pipeline
- [Sentinel Fraud Detection](https://github.com/rehan243/Sentinel-AI-Fraud-Detection) — Explainable ML
- [AI Engineering Notes](https://github.com/rehan243/AI-Engineering-Notes) — Daily research articles

## Tech Stack

Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, LangChain, LlamaIndex, HuggingFace, vLLM,
FastAPI, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, GCP, Azure, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis,
Kafka, FAISS, ChromaDB, Git, GitHub Actions, MLflow, Weights & Biases
